what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment for the design-source channel, pointing to the image asset at image://design-source/vt-architects/p-3 and noting when it was added.
observations: The file consists only of YAML front matter with no body content.
The target uses a custom image:// URI scheme under design-source/vt-architects/p-3.
The id follows an att- prefix pattern: att-89cdd659.
standouts: Links a design-source channel entry to an image asset via image://design-source/vt-architects/p-3.
Timestamped addition record in channel-memory ledger.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter for structured metadata.
Follows an id prefix convention att-<hash>.
Uses a channel-memory ledger format with channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Addresses media via a URI-style target rather than a filesystem path.
concerns: The target URI does not indicate file format, size, or MIME type.
No uploader, author, or provenance fields are present beyond the timestamp.
No caption, alt text, or description for the image is provided.
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that ties a design-source channel item to an image asset using a custom image:// URI.
questions: What image format and resolution does the target asset have?
What does 'p-3' refer to within vt-architects?
Which specific channel message or design artifact is this attachment associated with?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file's purpose is to record an image attachment for a channel, and that is exactly what the metadata does.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a durable, queryable record linking a channel conversation or artifact to a specific image asset in a namespaced storage location.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to address channel media assets within a structured attachment ledger.
contribution: It contributes the attachment record that establishes a relationship between the design-source channel and the image asset at vt-architects/p-3, along with an addition timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment ledger entry of type images for the design-source channel, targeting image://design-source/vt-architects/p-3 and added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to record and preserve the association of an image asset with a design-source channel entry.
